data.title: Polyglot Lint & Format Gates: stack-agnostic lint/format config and gate scripts
data.description:
Make auto-format.sh and validate.sh read from commands.format, commands.lint, and commands.format_check config keys instead of hardcoded ruff/mypy invocations. Add Ruby dependency extraction to gate-2d and JS/Ruby ast-grep patterns to gate-2b. Onboarding auto-detects stack and writes default keys; all gate scripts degrade gracefully when keys are absent.

Success Criteria:
- auto-format.sh reads commands.format (ESLint with --pass-on-no-pattern, RuboCop via bundle exec rubocop)
- validate.sh routes lint/format checks through commands.lint and commands.format_check
- gate-2d-dependency-check.sh adds Ruby require/require_relative extraction
- gate-2b-blast-radius.sh adds JS/Ruby ast-grep fan-in patterns
- Onboarding writes commands.lint, commands.format, commands.format_check defaults for detected stack
- CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md documents commands.lint, commands.format, commands.format_check
- INSTALL.md updated with ESLint and RuboCop optional dependency notes
- README.md updated to reflect polyglot lint/format gate support
